untranslatable_reason: Signal requires custom macro indicators (Interest Rate Ratio 'R', Inflation Yield Oscillator 'IYO', Rate of Inflation, 3-month Treasury Yield) that are not available in the allowed indicator list. These are external macro/fixed-income data sources, not price/volume-based technical indicators. The signal also requires 3-month yield comparison (Yield_t vs Yield_t-3m) which requires external bond market data not in scope.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_2 is a macroeconomic regime signal based on interest rate dynamics and inflation metrics. Without access to actual interest rate ratio calculations and inflation yield oscillator values, a direct technical translation is impossible. A placeholder rule using price/SMA crossovers has been provided as a structural template, but does not represent the original signal's intent or logic.
